name: Stuffed Peppers
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup to 3/4 cup mozzarella cheese (optional), grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice according to package directions.
2. Preheat oven to 400°F.
3. Remove tops from peppers, discard seeds, and place peppers in a large baking dish. Set aside the tops and finely chop any usable portion.
4. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Sauté chopped bell peppers and onions until softened. Add TVP® granules and stir well. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
5. Mix in parsley and continue cooking on low heat for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Combine the cooked rice with the pepper and onion mixture, adding 1 1/2 cups of spaghetti sauce. Stir to combine and season with salt and pepper as desired.
7. Spoon the mixture into each hollowed-out pepper. Cover the dish and bake in a preheated oven for approximately 45 minutes or until tender.
8. Uncover the baking dish and sprinkle mozzarella cheese on top, if using. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.
